acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/lib/allowlist.py contains match_sentinel_grant_for_write(task_id, session_id, target_path); a valid unexpired sentinel exists at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json with allowed_operations = [{"op": "Write", "target": "/path/to/file.json"}] and grant.session_id == session_id
acceptance_criteria.then: returns the matched dict entry (not None); when called with wrong session_id returns None; when called with different target_path returns None; when called with expired sentinel returns None

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh is invoked as a PreToolUse hook with Write tool targeting an existing file; is_subagent=false
acceptance_criteria.when: case A: a valid sentinel grant for the task-id exists with op='Write', target matching the file_path AND case B: a sentinel exists but does NOT match the file_path
acceptance_criteria.then: case A: hook exits 0 (write allowed); case B: hook exits 2 (blocked) AND legacy read_grant('Write') is NOT consulted (CF-1 parity)

check.method: bash smoke test with crafted stdin payloads + synthetic /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json
cases: sentinel match on existing file: exit 0
sentinel exists-but-no-match on existing file: exit 2 without consulting legacy grant
no sentinel + legacy grant present: exit 0 (legacy path still works)
no sentinel + no legacy grant: exit 2 (overwrite blocked)

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py fires for tool_name='Write'; a sentinel grant for the task-id exists with op='Write', target matching file_path
acceptance_criteria.when: the PostToolUse event fires with any terminal result (success, failure, non_zero)
acceptance_criteria.then: consume_sentinel_grant_on_terminal_result() is called; sentinel file is unlinked; the Bash sentinel path is unaffected

check.method: python3 unit test or bash smoke test; verify sentinel file unlinked after Write event
cases: Bash event with Write sentinel present: sentinel NOT consumed (Bash path separate)

acceptance_criteria.given: the three target files have been modified by dev
acceptance_criteria.then: only hooks/lib/allowlist.py, hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh, hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py appear in the diff (plus optionally hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py); hooks/userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh is NOT in the diff
